Uses of Interface
nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.runtime.ReportContextAware

Packages that use ReportContextAware
Package
Description
nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper
Provides JasperReports integration entry points.
nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.generator
Implements concrete Jasper report generators.
nonprofitbookkeeping.service
Implements application service-layer use cases.

  • Uses of ReportContextAware in nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractReportGenerator
    Base class for Jasper report generators.
    class 
    BundledTemplateJasperGenerator
    Generator used when only bundle metadata is available on the classpath.
